query: SELECT l.id, l.salesAmount, COUNT(p.id) as product_count FROM brand_livestreams l LEFT JOIN livestream_products p ON l.id = p.livestreamId GROUP BY l.id HAVING product_count > 0 ORDER BY l.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT l.id, l.salesAmount, COUNT(p.id) as product_count FROM brand_livestreams l LEFT JOIN livestream_products p ON l.id = p.livestreamId GROUP BY l.id HAVING product_count > 0 ORDER BY l.id DESC LIMIT 5;
